title: Signal
description: DRAFT v1 — one row in the shared `signals` table (PLAN §7.1). THE single source of truth for the signal contract: packages/shared (zod), wcc_impact (Python), and supabase/migrations (SQL) all mirror this file. Freeze target: 26-27 Jul against Alex's dataset list.

id.description: UUID primary key — generated by the database; never supply on insert.

created_at.description: Row insertion time (ISO 8601) — set by the database.

observed_at.description: When the underlying event was observed in the real world (ISO 8601).

reported_at.description: When the source reported/published the event (ISO 8601).

source.description: Human-readable origin, e.g. 'GeoNet', 'NZTA Journey Planner', 'community report'.

signal_type.description: Module-chosen event category, kebab-case, e.g. 'flooding', 'outage', 'road-closure'. Also drives the manifest's homeStat.signalType filter.

title.description: Short headline shown on the feed card and map popup.

lat.description: WGS84 latitude. Null for non-geolocated signals.

lng.description: WGS84 longitude. Null for non-geolocated signals.

verification.description: Triage/verification state. Only updatable post-insert by authenticated users (RLS).

confidence.description: 0-1 confidence score (e.g. from corroboration or ask_claude classification).

media_urls.description: Public URLs into the shared media bucket (media/<module_id>/...).

module_id.description: Owning module's id (= folder name under modules/). Must reference an ENABLED row in the modules table or the insert is rejected by RLS.
